items.title: Victorian government tries to head off teacher strike with new pay offer

children.content: The government says its new offer amounts to a 28.3 per cent pay increase for teachers, principals and support staff over the next four years.

gallery.altText: Man holds a placard reading 'lowest funded schools, lowest paid teachers' at a rally in Melbourne.

thumbnail.altText: Man holds a placard reading 'lowest funded schools, lowest paid teachers' at a rally in Melbourne.

items.title: Prescribed opioids led to addiction for woman battling endometriosis

children.content: Natasha Trajkovski never imagined her prescribed opioid medication to help with the pain of endometriosis would lead her to addiction.

image.altText: Head shot of a young woman with dark hair in a bun, smiling

items.title: Victorian council 'disgusted' by mining company's attitude

children.content: A regional council has declined a mining company's invitation to join a community reference group and slammed the company for its attitude towards community concerns.

image.altText: aerial shot of the avonbank site

items.title: Watchdog directs judge to counselling after 'inappropriate' comments

children.content: A Victorian judge who admonished a barrister in front of her client will receive counselling and training, following a ruling by the judicial watchdog.

gallery.altText: Man with glasses looks at the camera

thumbnail.altText: Man with glasses looks at the camera

items.title: Driver flips car during police chase through Melbourne suburbs

children.content: Police arrest a driver and his passenger after a high-speed chase through Melbourne's north-eastern suburbs.

image.altText: A crashed car on its roof.

items.title: Father 'disgusted' over inadequacy of charges after Laos methanol poisoning

children.content: A Melbourne father whose daughter died from methanol poisoning in Laos has said he is "disgusted" over the inadequacy of charges expected to be laid.

image.altText: Side-by-side photos of Bianca Jones and Holly Bowles, two Melbourne teens who have been hospitalised in Thailand

items.title: ANU head apologises for failing to protect Jewish staff, students

children.content: The interim vice-chancellor of the Australian National University has apologised for the institution's failure to protect the psychological safety of Jewish students and staff during pro-Palestinian encampments in 2024.

articles.title: 'My father was an antisemite': Uni leader's personal submission to royal commission

children.content: The chancellor of Western Sydney University says tertiary institutions have hidden behind freedom of expression to avoid taking action on hate speech.

image.altText: Jennifer Westacott against a dark background

articles.title: Sydney uni chief regrets handling of pro-Palestinian encampments

children.content: A royal commission hears how both the universities of Melbourne and Sydney have improved processes for students to make complaints in the wake of antisemitic experiences by staff and students, which escalated in 2024.

image.altText: Mark Scott wearing a suit and tie and glasses sitting at a desk looking forward

gallery.altText: Tents set up with buildings in the background on the ANU campus.

thumbnail.altText: Tents set up with buildings in the background on the ANU campus.

items.title: Moira Deeming to be disendorsed as a Liberal candidate after dropping court action

children.content: Victoria's Liberal Party is set to drop Moira Deeming as an upper house candidate following contested claims against former state leader Matthew Guy.

image.altText: A woman leaving a meeting room in parliament

items.title: 'I covered my ears': Scott responds as Cats injury crisis worsens

children.content: Geelong beats St Kilda at Kardinia Park to kick off round 19 of the AFL, but the injury list gets longer with a concerning leg issue for Max Holmes.

image.altText: A Geelong AFL player grimaces as he is helped around the boundary by medical staff after being injured.

items.title: Disclosure scheme could have prevented intimate partner abuse, woman says

children.content: A survivor of family violence wants victims to have access to information about a person's previous offences.

gallery.altText: A woman stands silhouetted in front of a window.

thumbnail.altText: A woman stands silhouetted in front of a window.

items.title: Drug traffickers jailed over failed plot to smuggle cocaine from PNG by plane

children.content: Two masterminds behind a 2020 plot to bring $80 million worth of cocaine into Australia were sentenced in Victoria’s County Court, five years after a failed drug trafficking flight.

image.altText: Man inspecting crashed aeroplane in long grass with shrubbery in the background

items.title: Country footballer handed life ban after opponents' complaint

children.content: A player and assistant coach for a southern NSW AFL team has been handed a "life ban" following a tribunal hearing into eight offences.

image.altText: A player in an AFL guernsey doing a ridgy didge hand signal

items.title: Suppression order lifted on child abuse content producer in Victoria

children.content: A man covertly filmed women and children at a Mildura home and used AI to create explicit content.

gallery.altText: A man looks at the camera.

thumbnail.altText: A man looks at the camera.

items.title: Family of Australian missing in US says somebody 'does know something'

children.content: Australian police say they're ready to help US authorities, as a weeks-long search for Melbourne woman Sally Grace Contarino continues in Las Vegas.

image.altText: Sally Grace Contarino

items.title: Victoria's top cop helps arrest alleged armed offender in Melbourne CBD

children.content: Victoria Police Chief Commissioner Mike Bush has helped arrest a man who had fled from police, helping to take down the man in while driving past in the CBD.

image.altText: Mike Bush

items.title: Concerns over loophole allowing residents to shut down Victorian councils

children.content: Advocates say that unproven charges such as those against councillors at Hepburn Shire, triggering automatic stand-down laws, can bring any other council across the state to a shuddering halt.

items.title: GP clinic network hit by major cyber breach

children.content: Partnered Health, which operates more than 50 general practice and skin cancer clinics across Australia, has identified more than a dozen clinics where it fears patient information was taken.

image.altText: A white front reception desk of a medical clinic, with a white business sign, and a TV and open door in one corner.

items.title: Disgraced footballer Nicky Winmar removed from AFL Hall of Fame

children.content: Winmar was found guilty earlier this month of three counts of unlawful assault and common law assault.

image.altText: Nicky wearing a grey coat and sunglasses.

items.title: Primary teacher played kissing game with student, jury hears

children.content: Former Gippsland teacher stands trial over continued sexual abuse of primary school student in the 90s

image.altText: A smiling, middle-aged woman with dyed hair takes a selfie in a bedroom.

items.title: Moira Deeming drops court bid against party after last-ditch plea to retain candidacy

children.content: Victorian MP Moira Deeming faces being disendorsed as a Liberal candidate for refusing to apologise to former party leader Matthew Guy, after accusing him of assaulting her at a community event in May.

image.altText: Moira Deeming walking with a folder in her hand.

items.title: Police investigate attempted sexual assault of Melbourne dog walkers

children.content: Police are investigating after two women reported that a man attempted to assault them before the dogs they were walking chased him away.

image.altText: Dogs chasing a man along a creek

items.title: Truck driver's sacking for $100k ice cream bungle was fair, finds commission

children.content: The Fair Work Commission rules a trucking company was within its rights to fire a driver after he set the temperature of his trailer full of ice cream more than 20 degrees too warm.

image.altText: A road train with the logo EHR in green.

items.title: Melbourne mother accused of showing IS propaganda to her children

children.content: Police allege a Melbourne woman facing terrorism charges showed Islamic State propaganda videos to her children about slaughtering "disbelievers".

gallery.altText: Child watches laptop with terrorist propaganda video featured

thumbnail.altText: Child watches laptop with terrorist propaganda video featured

avatar.alt: A man with dark skin in a suit looks at the camera

items.title: Melbourne home sprayed with bullets for second time in a week

children.content: A shooter opened fire on Kealba home, in one of two drive-by shootings in Melbourne's north-west overnight.

image.altText: Bullet in street

items.title: The new political parties hoping to deceive 'useful idiots' in Victoria

children.content: New political parties are seeking to exploit Victoria's anachronistic electoral system in the upper house to harvest voters' preferences and funnel them wherever they please.

image.altText: A Victorian Electoral Commission white-coloured ballot box

items.title: Melbourne council bans e-bikes after six-year trial

children.content: Yarra Council says e-bike operator Lime refused to take responsibility for retrieving dumped bikes.

image.altText: Lime bikes close-up.

items.title: Two dead in truck crash at Heathcote, north of Melbourne

children.content: A car and truck collided about 9.45pm on the McIvor Highway at Heathcote.

image.altText: A crashed car and police vehicle.

items.title: Mystery remains over sudden departure of Mildura Hospital CEO

children.content: Mystery surrounds the departure of the chief executive of Mildura Base Public Hospital, who led the north-west Victorian hospital through its transition from private to public.

gallery.altText: Mildura Base Public Hospital CEO Terry Welch wears a white shirt and black suit.

thumbnail.altText: Mildura Base Public Hospital CEO Terry Welch wears a white shirt and black suit.
